fix.item: Prevented administrator and raw com_content fallback URLs from appearing in generated sitemap output.
Improved sitemap cache filtering so old invalid URLs are skipped before XML rendering.

language.item: Updated English and Turkish administrator language files, including dashboard support copy.
Updated package and system plugin SYS language descriptions.

addition.item: Added dashboard support box with JoomTheme website and support email.
Added smart SEO priority handling for products, documentation, contact/about and policy pages.
Added default SEO exclusions for search, authentication, administrative and non-indexable output URLs.
Added Joomla update server and changelog metadata for JED-ready distribution.

change.item: Package manifest now advertises the public update server and changelog URL.

note.item: After updating, purge the sitemap cache and rebuild the sitemap from the component dashboard.

fix.item: Prevented administrator and raw com_content fallback URLs from appearing in generated sitemap output.
Improved sitemap cache filtering so old invalid URLs are skipped before XML rendering.

language.item: Updated English and Turkish administrator language files, including dashboard support copy.
Updated package and system plugin SYS language descriptions.

addition.item: Added dashboard support box with JoomTheme website and support email.
Added smart SEO priority handling for products, documentation, contact/about and policy pages.
Added default SEO exclusions for search, authentication, administrative and non-indexable output URLs.
Added Joomla update server and changelog metadata for JED-ready distribution.

change.item: Package manifest now advertises the public update server and changelog URL.

note.item: After updating, purge the sitemap cache and rebuild the sitemap from the component dashboard.

fix.item: Prevented administrator and raw com_content fallback URLs from appearing in generated sitemap output.
Improved sitemap cache filtering so old invalid URLs are skipped before XML rendering.

language.item: Updated English and Turkish administrator language files, including dashboard support copy.
Updated package and system plugin SYS language descriptions.

addition.item: Added dashboard support box with JoomTheme website and support email.
Added smart SEO priority handling for products, documentation, contact/about and policy pages.
Added default SEO exclusions for search, authentication, administrative and non-indexable output URLs.
Added Joomla update server and changelog metadata for JED-ready distribution.

change.item: Package manifest now advertises the public update server and changelog URL.

note.item: After updating, purge the sitemap cache and rebuild the sitemap from the component dashboard.
